modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to open calendar invite attachments in Outlook

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to open a calendar invite they got, right? But for some reason, the .ics file just wouldn’t open in Outlook. They were on the phone with me, sounding a bit frustrated, saying it’s like the invite just doesn’t want to work. It’s a bit odd since they’ve opened these kinds of files before without any issues.
short_description: Unable to open calendar invite attachments in Outlook
description: So, the user was trying to open a calendar invite they got, right? But for some reason, the .ics file just wouldn’t open in Outlook. They were on the phone with me, sounding a bit frustrated, saying it’s like the invite just doesn’t want to work. It’s a bit odd since they’ve opened these kinds of files before without any issues.
